text: In consideration of the payments, the receipt and sufficiency of which Subcontractor acknowledges, the undersigned acknowledges the complete satisfaction of, and forever waives and releases, all claims of every kind that Subcontractor has or may have in connection with Contractor, the Project and the Property and which could be asserted against the Project, the Property, Contractor, Owner, any lender on the Project and all officers, shareholders, members, managers, directors, agents and employees of any of them. Contractor is specifically relying on the foregoing in its dealings with Owner.
